race.comment: STUNG (2) was very impressive here two weeks ago when taking out the Clare Lindop Stakes. She was running away from them late over the mile, so she should be even stronger out to 1800m. She'll just need a touch of luck from the draw. KAZARU (3) drops back in trip after her smart Tasmanian Oaks win 50 days ago and kept the legs ticking over with a trial. She should blend into it nicely from a middle draw. MATING CALL (6) covered plenty of ground behind STUNG last start but never gave in. She'll be at her top now and with a smart steer can be right in the finish. FREEDOM FLAME (4) and SYNTHESISE (8) also come through the Clare Lindop and both were strong to the line. They're fitter and deserve respect.
